reviews.review_msg: Great prof. He connects the material to everyday life in a funny but helpful way, and it genuinely changes how you think about the world. Attending lecture helps a lot. Do the textbook, understand the concepts, and stay on top of things. Office hours are worth it if you start falling behind. Appreciate the challenge. Very rewarding class!
She is a good teacher. I think she teaches things very clearly. Something I am not very clear when I am reading the book, I can get the clear answer from her lecture. I like her class.
It's a class where if you don't understand the concept then you wouldn't pass the course. Overall practice ALOT of past exam questions to be prepared, her lectures are okay. The curve will save you!
her accent makes it impossible to understand she never comes prepared for her lectures and makes examples up on the spot  her instruction are never clear
